Text.Page:
I still wonder where those people came from—the ones who built the obelisk. They came from the direction of Lee's End Stead.

Can you go there and take Karadus this report? Maybe he'll have some idea about them.

Cregan sent you?

We've been cut off by a bunch of murderous mutants. I'm surprised you got through."This is for you."

My guess is the people Cregan saw were part of the Free Brotherhood.

I know, I know—they don't look much like farmers. They've been...changed.

They're Lokians now.
